rationale: The citing paper focuses on cause-related marketing promotions in FMCG retail, while the cited paper studies informational/emotional TV ad content effects on search and sales in autos, so topical overlap is only broad (marketing effectiveness/positioning moderators). The matched evidence is only a DOI-level bibliography match (no in-text citation context or reference text), so there is not enough evidence to confidently classify it as clearly incidental or clearly central.
